query:
SELECT id, name, status, currentStep, 
  LENGTH(briefingContent) as briefingLen,
  (riskMatricesData IS NOT NULL) as hasRisks,
  (actionPlansData IS NOT NULL) as hasPlans,
  (scoringData IS NOT NULL) as hasScoring,
  (decisaoData IS NOT NULL) as hasDecisao
FROM projects WHERE id = 267;

SELECT id, name, status, currentStep FROM projects 
WHERE status IN ('aprovado','em_andamento','concluido') 
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
